scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@flight-finder/web && npm run lint --workspace=@flight-finder/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@flight-finder/web && npm run typecheck --workspace=@flight-finder/cli
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@flight-finder/web && npm run test --workspace=@flight-finder/cli
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run build --workspace=@flight-finder/cli
